title: linum subteres
intro: Linum subteres, also known as yellow flax or wild yellow flax, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Linum subteres can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
